summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iran War Monitor news digest dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly with excellent dark theme implementation.

minor_issues.issue: Filter validation logic expects items to have 'all' tag, but 'all' correctly returns all items regardless of tags
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - behavior is correct

passed_tests: POST /api/news endpoint accepts JSON and saves to database
GET /api/news returns all news items sorted newest first
Frontend dashboard loads and displays news cards correctly
All filter buttons (All, Iran, War, Nuclear, Diplomacy) work properly
News cards display title, source, time, tags, and external links
Dark theme styling applied correctly with proper contrast
Case-insensitive tag filtering works across all tags
External links open in new tab with proper security attributes
Stats bar shows correct item counts and active filter
Type badges distinguish between RSS and YouTube content
Responsive grid layout displays cards properly
Loading states and empty states handled correctly
